hypothesis: Augmenting MOFid-based prompts with explicit 3D structural descriptors (e.g., surface area, pore volume, pore size distribution, SBUs connectivity) derived from MOF crystal structures and fed during continual pre-training and/or supervised fine-tuning will reduce MAE on QMOF and hMOF property predictions compared to text-only inputs, with the largest gains when the SFT dataset is limited (≤5K samples).
